generated_comment: Bro, half the time when she goes off in meetings it just feels like full PMS energy, not some big strategic point. Today she was surprisingly calm though 😅 don't take it seriously, I'm just joking.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it attributes a woman's behavior and professional input to PMS/hormones, undermining her rationality and credibility. It uses both direct period-related language and the 'surprisingly calm' joke pattern, plus the dismissive 'I'm just joking' defense.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
